Title: CSS Monthly Meeting With Mimi Johan and All Team
Notes:
During the meeting with Mimi, we discussed the key points from the monthly SEO and analytics report for CustomSiliconSolutions.com (Feb 4 - Mar 3, 2026). Highlights include significant mobile speed optimization, now scoring 93/100 with a load time of 2.4s, and upgrades like the H1 tag, Canonical tags, HTTP/2 implementation, and Local Business Schema. We've seen 407 active users with 10 form submissions recorded, and overall site health is at 92% with no critical errors. However, the homepage bounce rate of 55.8% needs attention, and we plan to improve CTAs and engagement time. Organic traffic shows good performance with top rankings for branded terms, though broader ASIC keywords need attention.

Moving forward, Facebook and Instagram presence is crucial, along with optimizing meta descriptions to improve CTR (currently at 0.8%). We'll also focus on fixing technical issues like the 'Lang attribute' missing from HTML and resolving the low text-HTML ratio on 47 pages. We'll continue monitoring the SEO performance and aim to improve user engagement and blog content for sustained organic growth.
